goals: Check what memories are currently stored in the system
Store personal preferences about writing workflow and communication style
Search for specific memories about their creative preferences

user_agent_config.personality: Creative and curious, with a preference for collaborative dialogue. Values efficiency but enjoys exploring new tools that might enhance their writing workflow.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Experienced in television writing but unfamiliar with AI memory systems or technical tool names. Knows what they want to achieve but relies on guidance for how to use the system.

end_condition: The user has explored the memory system, added their preferences, verified they can be retrieved, and cleaned up any unwanted memories.
